name: Chi-chi's Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Select your favorite chicken breasts and place them in a shallow pan.
2. Choose your preferred margarita mix or sweet & sour mixture for the marinade.
3. Cover the chicken with the chosen marinade, ensuring it is fully coated.
4. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator for at least 24 hours to allow flavors to develop.
5. Before cooking, turn off any heat sources and refrigerate until ready to cook.
